name: Whitelist Bypass
subtitle: Experimental iOS builds for whitelist-bypass
description: Unsigned proxy-only iOS builds for AltStore/SideStore. Install Happ or Streisand on iPhone, start this app, then use the proxy profile link generated by the app: Add to Happ opens happ://add/<profile>, and Streisand can import the copied profile from clipboard. The proxy-only build does not include PacketTunnel, so it does not require NetworkExtension signing.

apps.name: Whitelist Bypass Proxy
apps.subtitle: SOCKS proxy over call transport
apps.localizedDescription: Experimental iOS proxy-only build for whitelist-bypass. Supports WB room URL normalization, for example https://stream.wb.ru/room/<room> is converted to wbstream://<room>. Install Happ or Streisand, start this app, then add the generated proxy profile: Happ uses the Add to Happ button (happ://add/<profile>), while Streisand imports the copied profile from clipboard. This AltStore build is proxy-only and does not include the PacketTunnel VPN extension.

versions.localizedDescription: Proxy-only AltStore build. Adds automatic WB stream URL normalization, refreshed UI, Add to Happ, and Copy for Streisand actions.

news.title: AltStore source added
news.caption: Proxy-only iOS build with WB room URL normalization, Happ and Streisand helper actions.
